parents.subject: LU-14826 mdt: getattr_name("..") under striped directory

commit.subject: LU-14823 tests: re-enable check_fhandle_syscalls
commit.message:
LU-14823 tests: re-enable check_fhandle_syscalls

Remove the non-functional check for HAVE_FHANDLE_SYSCALLS, since
that configure check was previously removed, and now the test is
silently failing to run at all.

Add checks for open_by_handle_at() on remote/striped directories.

Test-Parameters: trivial mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=sanityn
Fixes: 8e88bbfef5 ("LU-12477 lustre: remove obsolete config checks")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Id919343bf8bd7e49a3f97b6ef47840bfea300c1e
